cards.title: Electrotherapy Basics
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • TENS: 80–120 Hz for pain, 2–4 Hz for endorphins
  • IFT (Interferential): 4000 Hz carrier, 1–150 Hz sweep
  • Ultrasound: 1 MHz deep, 3 MHz superficial
  • SWD (Shortwave Diathermy): Contraindications essential
  • Wax bath: 43–45°C, paraffin wax protocol
